prompt: {"type":"enterprise cloud AI architecture infographic","style":"clean corporate vector diagram, white background, blue and teal palette, rounded rectangles, thin blue outlines, subtle shadows, Chinese-first bilingual labels with smaller English subtitles, symmetrical layout, presentation-slide quality","canvas":{"aspect_ratio":"4:3","resolution":"1024x768"},"title_block":{"headline":"{argument name=\"headline text\" default=\"云端 AI Agent 架构图\"}","subtitle":"面向云端任务执行、代码协作与大规模调度的 Cloud AI Agent Architecture","position":"top center"},"layout":{"center":{"type":"stacked architecture layers","count":7,"numbered":true,"layers":[{"index":1,"title":"接入与体验层","english":"access and experience layer","count":5,"items":["Web Console","IDE / CLI","API / SDK","消息通知 Slack / Email","任务看板 组织与项目空间"]},{"index":2,"title":"云端控制平面","english":"cloud control plane","count":6,"items":["API Gateway","Auth / Tenant","Session Manager","Project / Workspace Manager","Task Queue","Rate Limit / Billing"]},{"index":3,"title":"Agent 编排层","english":"agent orchestration layer","count":8,"items":["Planner / 任务规划器","Reasoner / 推理引擎","Context Manager / 上下文管理","Memory / 记忆系统","Prompt Builder","Workflow Orchestrator / 工作流编排","Policy Engine / 策略引擎","Multi-Agent Coordinator / 多 Agent 协同"]},{"index":4,"title":"执行运行时层","english":"execution runtime layer","count":8,"items":["Sandbox Pool / 容器沙箱","Browser / HTTP 工具","Code Runner / Terminal","Git Workspace","Tool Adapters / MCP","Scheduler / Worker","Test Runner","Artifact Executor / Patch & Diff"]},{"index":5,"title":"模型与智能服务层","english":"model and intelligence services layer","count":6,"items":["Model Router","Frontier LLM API","Embedding / Reranker","OCR / STT / TTS（可选）","Evaluator / Reflection","第三方 Agent / SaaS"]},{"index":6,"title":"数据与状态层","english":"data and state layer","count":8,"items":["Relational DB","Vector DB","Redis Cache","Session State","Artifact Store","对象存储 Object Storage","配置中心 Config","日志与审计 Logs"]},{"index":7,"title":"云基础设施层","english":"cloud infrastructure layer","count":8,"items":["Kubernetes / 容器编排","Service Mesh","Event Bus","Secrets / KMS","VPC / Network","Autoscaling","CI/CD","多区域容灾 DR"]}]},"left_sidebar":{"title":"可观测性 / SRE","position":"left","count":6,"items":["监控 Monitoring","Tracing","Metrics","日志聚合 Logs","成本与配额 Cost / Quota","告警 Alerting"]},"right_sidebar":{"title":"安全治理","position":"right","count":6,"items":["SSO / RBAC","密钥与 Secrets","策略护栏 Guardrails","人工审批 Human Approval","审计合规 Audit","数据隔离 Isolation"]},"connectors":"bidirectional blue arrows linking both sidebars to every central layer, plus vertical arrows between each architecture layer"},"visual_details":{"icons":"simple blue line icons in every box, one icon per module","boxes":"rounded white cards with pale blue or pale green tinted section backgrounds","section_colors":{"layers_1_2_5_7":"light blue","layer_3":"light lavender","layer_4":"light cyan","layer_6":"light green","sidebars":"deep royal blue headers with white text"},"typography":"bold dark navy Chinese headline, smaller gray-blue subtitle, medium-weight Chinese section labels, compact bilingual item labels"},"footer":{"position":"bottom center","text":"{argument name=\"footer text\" default=\"特性：云原生 • 多租户 • 弹性扩缩容 • 安全合规 • 人机协同 • 任务可追踪 • 支持多模型与多 Agent 协同\"}"},"quality":"crisp infographic, balanced spacing, high legibility, polished enterprise architecture slide suitable for keynote, documentation, and product marketing"}

breakdown.creativeCore: 云端 AI Agent 架构图：一张精美的双语企业级信息图，展示了分层的云端 AI Agent 架构，适用于演示文稿、产品说明及技术营销。
breakdown.subject: 信息结构
breakdown.text: 包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 知识卡片、科普图、社媒长图、教学材料

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 信息图/图解 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: symmetrical, vertical]。

Visual style:
[媒介/渲染方式/审美方向/色彩系统]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
